description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Daily build that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. It takes four required string inputs: image, build_name, command, and build. The workflow runs on a 'ce' and 'ubuntu' environment, checks out the repository, retrieves a previous build version, performs a daily build of the specified build_name using the provided image, command, and build target, and uploads the output to S3 along with the build revision.
